ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time when the game took place */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game in the format of home score - away score */,
  "overtime" TEXT /* Indicates if there was an overtime period */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season during which the game occurred */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs, exhibition) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the basketball team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the champion team of the season */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the Most Valuable Player of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_mvp_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("mvp_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the opposing team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game is played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs, exhibition) */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the game is to be played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedules_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedules_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "date_occurred" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_period" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery period in days */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "referee_role" TEXT /* Role of the referee (e.g., head referee, assistant referee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_referees_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event that occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team involved in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media coverage entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "network" TEXT /* Television network that broadcast the game */,
  "commentators" TEXT /* Commentators for the broadcast */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Broadcast ratings for the game */,
  "online_views" INTEGER /* Number of online views */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_coverage_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the game */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from ticket sales */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "average_ticket_price" REAL /* Average price of tickets sold */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan engagement entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "social_media_activity" INTEGER /* Level of social media activity related to the game */,
  "merchandise_sales" REAL /* Revenue generated from merchandise sales */,
  "fan_feedback_score" REAL /* Average feedback score from fans */,
  "fan_sentiment" TEXT /* Overall sentiment of fan feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "fan_age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of attending fans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team official, player, statistician, fan) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_highlights" (
  "highlight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game highlight */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media for the highlight (e.g., video, image) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL to the media file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the highlight */,
  "highlight_type" TEXT /* Type of highlight (e.g., top play, key moment) */,
  "highlight_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the highlight in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highlight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_highlights_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
